title: Li et al. zip
author: li, Qiaoran
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This data set contains 1) images shown in figures and supplemental figures. 2) tables contains the rawdata for generating bar plots and curves in both figures and supplemental figures. 3) molecular information includes: sequences of plasmids used to generating transgenic flies used in the study, PCR genotyping results and the fasta sequence obained from 11216-Gal4 screening line by the inverse PCR method.
steps_raw: This data set contains 1) images shown in figures and supplemental figures. 2) tables contains the rawdata for generating bar plots and curves in both figures and supplemental figures. 3) molecular information includes: sequences of plasmids used to generating transgenic flies used in the study, PCR genotyping results and the fasta sequence obained from 11216-Gal4 screening line by the inverse PCR method.
